data.label: Greeting
data.description: Greet the customer, introduce yourself, and ask what issue they're experiencing.

data.label: Diagnose Issue
data.description: Ask clarifying questions to identify the specific problem. Gather details: error messages, when it started, what the customer has already tried.

data.label: Attempt Fix
data.description: Walk the customer through a troubleshooting step. Confirm whether the fix worked. If resolved, proceed to wrap-up. If not, loop back to diagnose the next issue or escalate.

data.label: Escalate
data.description: If the issue cannot be resolved after multiple attempts, escalate to a senior technician. Provide the customer with a ticket number and expected callback time.

data.label: Wrap-up
data.description: Summarize what was done, confirm the customer is satisfied or aware of next steps, and close the call.
